features.name: Login and Registration Endpoints
features.description: Complete login and registration endpoints with JWT authentication
implementation_details: POST /api/v1/auth/login - User authentication with JWT token generation
POST /api/v1/auth/register - User registration with role-based access
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh - JWT token refresh functionality
GET /api/v1/auth/me - Current user information endpoint

features.name: Centralized Logging System
features.description: Structured logging with correlation IDs and security event tracking
implementation_details: Structured JSON logging with structlog for production
Human-readable logging for development environment
Performance metrics logging with threshold monitoring
Security event logging with user and IP tracking
Business event logging for audit trail
External service call logging with duration tracking
Sensitive data filtering for PII protection

features.name: Centralized Exception Handling
features.description: Global exception handlers with standardized error responses
implementation_details: Custom exception classes for different error types
Global exception handlers for ValidationError, NotFoundError, AuthenticationError
Standardized error response format with correlation IDs
Error message localization support
HTTP status code mapping for different exception types

features.name: Circuit Breaker Implementation
features.description: Circuit breaker pattern for external service resilience
implementation_details: Enhanced circuit breaker with configurable thresholds
Pre-configured circuit breakers for Stripe, banking, EDI, and Xactimate services
Circuit breaker state monitoring and health checks
Retry logic with exponential backoff
Integration with logging system for monitoring
Circuit breaker health check endpoint

features.name: Swagger Documentation
features.description: Auto-generated API documentation with OpenAPI specification
implementation_details: FastAPI auto-generated OpenAPI/Swagger documentation
Comprehensive schema definitions with examples
Authentication flow documentation
Request/response model documentation
Available at /docs and /redoc endpoints

features.name: Security Configuration
features.description: JWT authentication, password hashing, and security middleware
implementation_details: JWT token creation and verification with configurable expiration
BCrypt password hashing and verification
Role-based access control with decorators
CORS middleware configuration
Security context validation with IP and user agent checking
Correlation ID middleware for request tracking

features.name: Service Layer Implementation
features.description: Business logic layer with authentication and user management
implementation_details: AuthService with user authentication and token management
User registration with email uniqueness validation
Token refresh functionality with proper validation
Password hashing and verification utilities
Integration with database layer through SQLAlchemy

features.name: Database Integration
features.description: Async database operations with proper session management
implementation_details: Async SQLAlchemy 2.0+ integration with proper session handling
Database dependency injection for FastAPI routes
Support for both SQLite (development) and PostgreSQL (production)
Database health checks and monitoring
Transaction management for data consistency
